channel.title: entrepreneurship on Dillon de Silva
channel.description: Recent content in entrepreneurship on Dillon de Silva

item.title: An Inquiry Into STEM Educational Platforms
item.description: You have a chance to help out with a little market research for an entrepreneurship venture I’m embarking on. This survey is aimed at primary school, high school and university students (mainly in Australia). If you’re willing to participate, click the link below and you’ve helped make a step towards change. Thank you wonderful person reading this (that’s you :) )! Link to survey: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSe6Txd-vuI3iDzYrpuRNGgvx9W-PYfXWwWTU8Qcy0KxNd3TbQ/viewform?usp=sf_link
